results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.sql: SELECT p_ProductName."Product", p_Category."Category", p_Subcategory."Subcategory", s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" AS revenue, s_OrderQuantity."Sales Order Line" AS units_sold, (s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") AS gross_profit, ROUND((s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") / s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" * 100, 2) AS margin_pct, p_ProductName."Product", p_Category."Category", p_Subcategory."Subcategory", s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" AS revenue, s_OrderQuantity."Sales Order Line" AS units_sold, (s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") AS gross_profit, ROUND((s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") / s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" * 100, 2) AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON SalesSalesTerritoryKey."SalesTerritoryKey" = SalesSalesTerritoryKey."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."ProductKey" = ProductKey."ProductKey" JOIN Sales ON SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Customer ON CustomerKey."Postal Code" = CustomerKey."Postal Code" JOIN Date ON DateKey."Postal Code" = DateKey."Postal Code" JOIN Reseller ON ResellerKey."Postal Code" = ResellerKey."Postal Code" JOIN Sales ON SalesOrderLineKey."Postal Code" = SalesOrderLineKey."Postal Code" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."Postal Code" = ProductKey."Postal Code" WHERE SalesAmount."Sales Amount" > 0 ORDER BY SalesAmount."Sales Amount" DESC LIMIT 10
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Referenced table "SalesSalesTerritoryKey" not found!
Candidate tables: "Sales_Territory", "Sales"

LINE 1: ..." * 100, 2) AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON SalesSalesTerritoryKey."SalesTerritoryKey" = SalesSalesTerr...
                                                                        ^

results.question: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.

Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.

For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT ONST."Group", D."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year", ST."Channel" AS "top_channel", ST."Channel" AS "channel_revenue", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS "group_year_revenue", CASTROUNDIFNULLSUMSST."Sales Amount" / SUM(S."Sales Amount") * 100 AS "channel_revenue_share_pct" FROM Sales_Territory GROUP BY ST."Group", ST."Region", ST."Country", ST."Group", ST."Region",
